analysis_result: Same qualitative conclusion — MPNSTs (0.58 Muts/Mb) in middle of pediatric cancer spectrum
discrepancy_analysis: Qualitative CONCORDANT. Both the reported result and the model result reach the same qualitative conclusion: MPNSTs have a TMB that is higher than schwannoma, rhabdoid tumors, and neuroblastoma, and similar to medulloblastoma, placing MPNSTs in the middle of the pediatric cancer TMB spectrum (0.58 Muts/Mb).
